noAuctionsMatch: No auctions match your search criteria.
galleryEmpty: The gallery is currently empty. Be the first to create one!
heroSubtext: Bid on exclusive items, track real-time prices, and secure magnificent pieces with BidZo's high-performance bidding engine.
searchPlaceholder: Search auctions by title or keywords...
heroBodyText: Bid on rare antiques, art, and exquisite pieces — with real-time prices, bank-grade security, and built-in anti-sniping protection.
noCreditCard: No credit card required · Instant setup · Bank-grade security
featuresSubtext: BidZo is packed with tools that make bidding fast, safe, and transparent.
ctaSubtext: Create your free account in under 60 seconds and start bidding on India's most exclusive online auction platform.
alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
realTimeBiddingDesc: Live price updates the instant someone outbids you — no page refresh needed.
securePlatformDesc: Powered by Supabase with RLS policies ensuring every bid is tamper-proof.
antiSnipingTimerDesc: Last-second bids auto-extend the auction by 30 s — fair for every bidder.
smartNotificationsDesc: Instant alerts when you're outbid or when an auction is about to close.
priceTrackingDesc: Full bid history with timestamps for every auction, visible to all users.
indianRupeeNativeDesc: Built for India — all bids, prices and increments display in ₹ natively.
createAccountDesc: Sign up securely as a buyer or seller via email.
findGrailsDesc: Browse our curated gallery of premium auctions.
placeBidsStepDesc: Engage in real-time, zero-latency bidding wars.
